originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__driver_data_16` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&driver_data` is never used.
reasoning: 7acf6cd80b2.c L39: driver_data dead store — Pulse duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_67 (CSA). In the UNIX98_PTYS success path, driver_data is assigned at L39 but this value is never read (overwritten or not used on the success path). PC=CONFIG_UNIX98_PTYS=T — no library macros, correctly constrained. New bug.
